name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed payment deadlines cause service interruptions. We notify finance ops before payment deadlines instead of manual tracking of subscription renewals.
problem_solved: Etsy sellers miss payment deadlines for subscription services, leading to service interruptions.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Etsy sellers miss payment deadlines for subscription services, leading to service interruptions.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed payment deadlines cause service interruptions. We notify finance ops before payment deadlines instead of manual tracking of subscription renewals.
